# 06 — Antigravity Workflow

Use Antigravity with narrow prompts.

## Prompt contract

Every prompt should include:

- module;
- exercise;
- files allowed to edit;
- subject requirement;
- forbidden changes;
- validation command;
- expected final summary.

## Good task

"Implement `python_1_array/ex00/give_bmi.py` only. Match the subject prototypes. Do not edit other files. Run tester, py_compile, and flake8."

## Bad task

"Finish Python 1 and clean everything."

That is not a task. That is how repositories become archaeological sites.
